title: How do I configure my BackMarket account with SellerActive?
bodyHtml:
To get the integration working correctly, you will need to find the following Tokens.

  1. Backmarket Token
  2. SellerActive “SellerId” & “API Key”
  3. ShipStation “API Key” & “API Secret” 

We will go through how to locate all of these items, then tell you how to send them to us.


1. Backmarket Token

To make sure we can update your quantity and prices on BackMarket using REST API, you need to locate your BackMarket Token.

Here are the steps to find it:

→ Go on your Back Market Back Office 

→ Go on the Options tab > Integrations

→ Enter your password and get your token



 

2. SellerActive Token

We need this token to make sure we can get the Quantity and Prices of your Inventory in SellerActive.

To get it, you need to provide us your SellerID and your API Key from SellerActive. Then, we will generate your Token and share it with you. 

To do that, you just have to be logged on SellerActive and click here.


 


3. ShipStation Token

To make sure we can push regular 15 minutes updates on your ShipStation account, we need your ShipStation token.

There are 2 API Tokens: “API Key” & “API Secret”

  • Go to the settings > Account > API Settings (URL ending with shipstation.com/#/settings/api) 

 


How to share the info with your Seller Success Manager

You can go on the following Website: https://www.saltify.io/en/ and scroll down to write your information in the text fields: 

Paste the following text: 

  • BackMarket Token: 

  • SellerActive SellerID:

  • SellerActive API Key:

  • ShipStation API Key:

  • ShipStation API Secret:

Provide us the link and the “passphrase” if you set one, and we would then encrypt and save your values in our Database to start the connection.

In the near future, you will have an interface in your Back Office to provide us with this information without the struggle of this last part...

Thanks for your patience!
